prompt:
[BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open]
The provided reference image teaches the عقد / عقود ذهب brand identity — it teaches WHAT the product is, not how this frame must look. Identity DNA, preserved across any camera angle: «CLIENT: locked identity of عقد / عقود ذهب — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
Angle, framing, exact placement within the light pool, and the spotlight's precise character are creative decisions — choose what serves the theatrical reveal, keeping brand-readable surfaces oriented toward camera. INTEGRATION: the product is photographed inside this dark stage, not pasted onto it — the single spotlight that defines the void defines the product; its contact pool, falloff, and specular response all belong to the same light.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: Polished editorial luxury jewellery photography: warm directional key light with controlled soft falloff, high specular highlights that ride the gold's facets and beadwork, deep warm shadows (chiaroscuro) cut against maroon/leather grounds, shallow-to-medium depth of field, crisp macro detail on metalwork and stones, gallery/heirloom mood. On-model shots are soft-glam beauty crops (neck/decolletage, warm skin, muted earthy wardrobe). Subdued, refined, never flashy or cold-clinical. — default clean_studio with theatrical lift. Material truth: Strand of natural/freshwater pearls — soft satin-iridescent nacre with gentle directional sheen and subtle surface tooth (not glassy, not matte), each pearl catching a soft broad highlight rather than a hard specular point. Pendant is bright white gold + pavé/baguette diamonds: hard, cool, sparkling — a deliberate texture contrast against the warm soft pearl. — the substrate behaves as its real self under the hard beam (film stays pliable with honest creases, glass refracts, carton edges stay crisp). The lit portion shows genuine specular response and real texture where the spotlight rakes it; the shadowed portion falls to honest black, not crushed digital void. No CGI-clean perfection, no plastic uniformity, no artificial glow halo.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Princess-length strand ≈42–45cm; pearls ≈7–9mm each; pendant drop ≈35–40mm. Scale anchor: the human collarbone/decolletage — the strand sits at the base of the throat and the pendant falls roughly one hand-width below the hollow of the neck. — the product reads at its true real-world size. The spotlight pool is scaled to the product: an intimate beam for a small item, a wider theatrical pool for a large one. The pool of light on the ground is proportionate to the object standing in it.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Hero through closeness: the product holds a commanding share of frame — the negative black space is dramatic, not empty distance. Frame close enough that the spotlit material texture reads. No dead space between viewer and subject; the darkness presses in around a near, present hero.

[COLOR & CONTRAST]
The product's brand color, drawn from Deep wine-maroon / oxblood burgundy (≈#5C1A26–#6B1F2E) as the dominant brand-owned field colour, with a warm brown Sadu/Najdi geometric tone (≈#8A6A3A) used only inside the woven border motif, and creamy ivory/parchment (≈#EDE2C8) as the partner light field. Gold (≈#C9A24B) appears as a typographic/accent colour, never as a flat field. STRICTLY brand-owned — no off-brand red/orange/blue color-blocking allowed., is the only chromatic event in the entire frame — full saturation against total black; every other pixel is darkness. No borrowed accent colors, no secondary chromatic elements. Maximum drama through chromatic isolation.

[LIGHT & LENS]
ONE hard overhead spotlight, slightly forward, warm-white theatrical character with tight beam and rapid falloff — no fill; shadows fall to true black. A soft pool grounds the product beneath. Lens choice serves intimacy and compression — the model chooses focal feel and depth treatment that keeps the product crisp and the void absolute.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product stands or rests as gravity and its own form dictate within the pool — a sachet may lean or lie with honest folds, a bottle stands plumb, a jar sits square. No forced floating, no impossible balance.

[SCENE]
Creative seed (from the system): test
Theatrical single-spotlight composition. Product within a tight pool of hard light on an invisible dark surface, the light falling off rapidly into pure surrounding black. Strong negative space of pure black. The mood is reverent, theatrical, main-stage. Choice points for the model: beam angle nuance, product orientation within the pool, pool size and edge softness.

[SUBJECT]
Single product as the sole illuminated subject. Material rendered with full physical truth where the light touches; shadowed portions fall naturally dark while form stays readable.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product only. No human elements, no props, no secondary objects. Background pure black void. The single spotlight is the only light. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
Photoreal theatrical product photography, maximum fidelity. Deep-black cinema grade with the brand color punching at full saturation. No overlay text, no watermark, no logo other than the product's own.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian — minimal environmental localization. For oud/fragrance/heritage sectors the spotlight may warm toward candlelight reverence. warmer gold/sand/amber tones can warm the beam toward gold.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Across multiple generations of this chain, vary your choices: beam angle, product orientation, pool tightness, camera height, distance. Identity stays locked; the theatrical reveal should never look the same twice.

blocks: BRAND LOCK — identity invariant, composition open
